name: LEPTOMENINGEAL CYST
definition: "Growing" fracture = loculation of CSF into / through skull
dominant_finding: cyst isointense with CSF + communicating with subarachnoid space
discriminating_features: skull defect with indistinct scalloped margins
CSF-density cyst adjacent to / in skull, may contain cerebral tissue
cyst isointense with CSF + communicating with subarachnoid space
intracranial tissue extending between edges of bone
